description: Dashboard de visão geral de aplicações com Golden Signals, métricas OpenTelemetry, traces do Tempo e logs do Loki

panels.description: Taxa de requisições por segundo (Traffic)
panels.title: 📊 Traffic (RPS)

panels.description: Latência P50 das requisições
panels.title: ⚡ Latency P50

panels.description: Latência P99 das requisições
panels.title: 🔥 Latency P99

panels.description: Taxa de erros (HTTP 5xx)
panels.title: ❌ Error Rate

panels.description: Taxa de requisições por serviço ao longo do tempo
panels.title: Request Rate by Service

panels.description: Distribuição de latência P50, P90, P99
panels.title: Latency Distribution (P50/P90/P95/P99)

panels.description: Distribuição de status codes HTTP
panels.title: HTTP Status Distribution

panels.description: Taxa de erros ao longo do tempo por código de status
panels.title: Error Codes Over Time

panels.description: Latência por endpoint

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (http_route, http_request_method, le, service_name) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service"}[$__range])))  > 0.0001
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (http_route, http_request_method, le, service_name) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service"}[$__range]))) > 0.0001

panels.title: Endpoint Performance

panels.description: Latência por método HTTP ao longo do tempo

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (http_request_method, le, service_name) (rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service", service_namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m]))) > 0.0001

panels.title: P95 Latency by HTTP Method

panels.description: Tamanho médio do corpo das requisições recebidas

targets.expr: sum by (service_name) (rate(http_server_request_body_size_bytes_sum{service_name=~"$service", service_namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) > 0.0001 / sum by (service_name) (rate(http_server_request_body_size_bytes_count{service_name=~"$service", service_namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) > 0.0001

panels.title: Avg Request Body Size (Server)

panels.description: Tamanho médio do corpo das respostas enviadas

targets.expr: sum by (service_name) (rate(http_server_response_body_size_bytes_sum{service_name=~"$service", service_namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) > 0.0001 / sum by (service_name) (rate(http_server_response_body_size_bytes_count{service_name=~"$service", service_namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) > 0.0001

panels.title: Avg Response Body Size (Server)

panels.description: Taxa de requisições HTTP de saída
panels.title: Client Request Rate by Target

panels.description: Latência das requisições HTTP de saída (cliente)
panels.title: Client P95 Latency by Target

panels.description: Busca de traces distribuídos. Clique em um trace para ver detalhes.
panels.title: Recent Traces (Duration > 100ms)

panels.description: Service Graph mostrando as dependências entre serviços
panels.title: Service Graph

panels.description: Volume de logs por nível
panels.title: Log Volume by Level

panels.description: Logs da aplicação com suporte a correlação com traces
panels.title: Application Logs

panels.description: Logs de erro para investigação
panels.title: Error Logs Only

panels.description: Taxa de erros (HTTP 4xx/5xx) em chamadas externas

targets.expr:
sum by (server_address) (rate(http_client_request_duration_seconds_count{service_name=~"$service", service_namespace=~"$namespace", http_response_status_code=~"4..|5.."}[5m])) 
/ 
sum by (server_address) (rate(http_client_request_duration_seconds_count{service_name=~"$service", service_namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) > 0

panels.title: Client Error Rate

panels.description: Visão detalhada de dependências externas (RPS, Latência, Erros)
panels.title: External Dependencies Overview

title: Application Overview - Golden Signals
